topic.what: Automated vulnerability analysis report generation using multi-agent LLM system with RAG
topic.how: Four-phase agentic workflow (Explorer, Analyst, Reporter, Judge) leveraging RAG engine with hybrid retrieval and chunking strategies to synthesize Project Zero-style RCA reports
topic.why_matters: Scales vulnerability documentation workflows and assists human analysts by automating root cause analysis, impact assessment, and remediation guidance

characteristics.what_it_measures: Overall quality of generated vulnerability reports across 4 dimensions
characteristics.evidence: Average remediation success rate across 105 samples from NIST-SARD covering 15 CWE types
characteristics.context: Evaluated by dual-judge LLM system (Claude 4.5 Sonnet + Gemini 3.1 Pro)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Adherence to formatting guidelines and completeness of mandatory fields
characteristics.evidence: Best configuration (Contextual Chunking + Embeddings + Cross-Encoder) for Falcon H1R-7B

characteristics.what_it_measures: Factual correctness against ground truth annotation and source code
characteristics.evidence: Best configuration (Contextual Chunking + Hybrid + LLM Reranker) for Falcon H1R-7B
characteristics.context: Falcon H1R-7B dimension analysis; cross-encoder underperforms for contextual chunks

characteristics.what_it_measures: Technical depth, specificity, and logical consistency of report reasoning
characteristics.evidence: Best configuration (Flat Chunking + Hybrid + Cross-Encoder) for Falcon H1R-7B

characteristics.what_it_measures: Validity of proposed fix relative to identified root cause
characteristics.evidence: Best configuration (Contextual Chunking + Hybrid + LLM Reranker) for Falcon H1R-7B

characteristics.what_it_measures: Arithmetic mean of 8 criterion scores from 2 judges across 4 dimensions
characteristics.evidence: Best configuration (Contextual Chunking + Hybrid + LLM Reranker) for Falcon H1-34B-Instruct across 10 RAG configurations
characteristics.context: 40 experiments total (4 Falcon models × 10 RAG configurations)

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of distinct CWE types handled
characteristics.evidence: NIST-SARD dataset includes CWE-119, CWE-787, CWE-476, CWE-457, CWE-416, CWE-170, CWE-122, CWE-121, CWE-120, CWE-415, CWE-401, CWE-193, CWE-126, CWE-124, CWE-123
characteristics.context: Memory corruption focused test set of 105 samples

characteristics.what_it_measures: Number of documents ingested into RAG engine
characteristics.evidence: 70 Google Project Zero reports + 1321 chapters from 2735-page CWE MITRE PDF
characteristics.context: Data collection pipeline ingests web scraped reports and OCR-processed PDF content

novelty: Unified multi-agent framework integrating RAG with LLM agents for automated vulnerability report generation
Task-specific dual-LLM Judge evaluating reports across structural integrity, factual grounding, code reasoning, and remediation
Modular RAG engine with 3 chunking strategies (Flat, Contextual, HyPE) and 3 retrieval methods (Embeddings, Hybrid, HyPE) with configurable rerankers
Google Project Zero RCA template-aligned report generation pipeline
open_problems: False negatives: incorrectly classifying vulnerable code as non-vulnerable
Fix validity: models generate syntactically correct fixes that bypass rather than address root causes
Cross-encoder reranker underperformance on contextual chunks for Falcon H1R model
Multi-file context and project-specific design pattern understanding for complex vulnerabilities
